description: Used when a returning user starts a new session. Pulls from user memory.

callbacks.template: Welcome back, {username}. Last time you {last_topic}. I figured you'd be too embarrassed to return.
Oh look who came back. Your previous roast damage was {last_damage}%. We've raised the bar. And your self-esteem has lowered it.
Hi {username}! 👋 Still {recurring_habit}? Bold of you to keep that energy.
